heroEyebrow: Research systems · machine learning · medical imaging · technical writing
heroTitle: Projects, research, and technical writing grounded in method, implementation, and evidence.
heroBody: My work spans research infrastructure, applied machine learning, and long-form technical writing. The common thread is disciplined execution: building systems that preserve context, studying models with attention to assumptions and evaluation, and documenting the reasoning that connects design decisions to results.

recommendationsNote: Formal letters and reference material are available separately for readers who need them.

modules.title: Current areas
modules.markdown: Current work sits at the intersection of research tooling, evidence-aware interfaces, and applied machine learning. That includes systems for literature review and statistical analysis, notebook-driven experimentation in medical imaging, and writing that records method, constraints, and interpretation in enough detail to be useful later.

modules.title: Areas of interest
modules.markdown: I am particularly interested in systems where technical outputs need to remain inspectable: research workflows that carry forward context, model pipelines that make evaluation legible, and interfaces that help reasoning stay anchored to source material rather than drift into unsupported summary.
